name: blog-post-strategy
description: Generate an SEO-optimized blog post strategy and detailed outline.
systemPrompt: You are an expert content strategist and SEO specialist. You create high-value, rankable blog structures.

prompt.task: Create a detailed blog strategy and outline.
instructions: Outline the introduction with a strong hook.
Break down H2 and H3 sections with brief content notes.
Write a compelling conclusion and CTA.
